function_v0.doc:
Add a voter to the governance voter set.

Auth:
- Admin only.

Effects:
- Grants the address voting rights for future proposals.
- Emits a voter-added event.
function_v0.name: add_voter

function_v0.doc:
Cast a vote for the currently active proposal.

Auth:
- The provided voter address must authorize the call.

Effects:
- Records the voter\xe2\x80\x99s approval for the supplied proposal hash.
function_v0.name: cast_vote

function_v0.doc:
Return the current admin address.

Notes:
- Read-only helper for configuration inspection.
function_v0.name: get_admin

function_v0.doc:
Return the configured registry contract address.

Notes:
- Read-only helper for dependency inspection.
function_v0.name: get_registry

function_v0.doc:
Remove a voter from the governance voter set.

Auth:
- Admin only.
function_v0.name: remove_voter

function_v0.doc:
Update the factory admin address.

Auth:
- Current admin authorization required.

Effects:
- Replaces the account that controls privileged factory actions.
- Emits an admin update event.
function_v0.name: update_admin

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the factory and its core dependencies.

Auth:
- Intended to run once during contract setup.

Effects:
- Stores admin and dependency contract addresses.
- Stores the initial approved wallet wasm hash.
- Adds the initial admin as a governance voter.

Notes:
- Re-initialization is blocked once admin state exists.
- New wallets deployed after this point inherit the configured dependencies.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Execute a passed upgrade proposal.

Auth:
- Admin authorization required to trigger execution.

Effects:
- Applies the approved governance outcome.
- Returns the wasm hash that was applied or activated.
function_v0.name: apply_upgrade

function_v0.doc:
Deploy and initialize a new wallet instance.

Effects:
- Creates a new wallet using the currently approved wallet version.
- Passes wallet auth material into the deployment flow.
- Emits a wallet creation event after successful deployment.
function_v0.name: create_wallet

function_v0.doc:
Cancel the currently active proposal.

Auth:
- Admin only.

Effects:
- Clears the active proposal state before execution.
function_v0.name: cancel_proposal

function_v0.doc:
Return the configured fee manager contract address.

Notes:
- Read-only helper for dependency inspection.
function_v0.name: get_fee_manager

function_v0.doc:
Create a new upgrade proposal.

Auth:
- Admin only.

Effects:
- Starts a new proposal for upgrade governance.
- Stores the proposed target hash for voting/execution flow.
function_v0.name: propose_upgrade

function_v0.doc:
Update the registry dependency used by the factory.

Auth:
- Admin only.

Effects:
- Replaces the registry address used for future wallet deployments.
- Emits a registry update event.
function_v0.name: update_registry

function_v0.doc:
Return the currently approved wallet version hash.

Notes:
- Read-only helper used to inspect deployment version state.
function_v0.name: get_wallet_version

function_v0.doc:
Update the fee manager dependency used by the factory.

Auth:
- Admin only.

Effects:
- Replaces the fee manager address used for future wallet deployments.
- Emits a fee manager update event.
function_v0.name: update_fee_manager

udt_union_v0.doc:
Shared access/config storage keys.

DESIGN:
- Most addresses here are contract-wide configuration and live in instance storage.
- Some identity-related keys are included for compatibility with other modules,
even if they are not read/written directly in this file.

IMPORTANT:
- This file provides low-level storage/auth helpers only.
- It does not enforce higher-level business rules such as uniqueness between
configured addresses or one-time initialization beyond what callers enforce.
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

udt_union_v0.doc:
Represents the type of upgrade proposal.

VARIANTS:
- `Upgrade` \xe2\x86\x92 upgrade the current contract WASM
- `WalletVersion` \xe2\x86\x92 update approved wallet implementation hash

DESIGN:
- Persisted in contract storage (`ProposalType`)
- Used to determine execution path during proposal finalization

CRITICAL COMPATIBILITY NOTE:
- This enum is stored on-chain.
- DO NOT:
- reorder variants
- remove existing variants

- Adding new variants requires:
- updating parsing logic (`upgrade_type`)
- ensuring existing stored values remain valid
udt_union_v0.name: UpgradeType

udt_union_v0.doc:
Supported social identity platforms.

DESIGN:
- Used for identity binding (wallet \xe2\x86\x94 platform \xe2\x86\x94 user_id)
- Stored and compared in normalized lowercase string form

IMPORTANT:
- Enum is persisted via contracttype \xe2\x86\x92 must remain backward compatible
- Do NOT reorder variants in future upgrades
udt_union_v0.name: SocialPlatform

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Represents a validator's signature over a message.

FIELDS:
- `validator`: identifier of validator (typically public key or hash)
- `signature`: signature bytes (expected 64 bytes)

ASSUMPTIONS:
- Signature scheme is fixed (e.g. Ed25519, BLS, etc.)
- Validation logic is handled elsewhere (this is just a data container)

IMPORTANT:
- Lengths are fixed:
- validator: 32 bytes
- signature: 64 bytes
- No validation is performed here
udt_struct_v0.name: ValidatorSignature

udt_union_v0.doc:
Storage keys derived from normalized identity inputs.

DESIGN:
- `UseridWalletMap` stores mappings derived from `(platform, user_id)`
- `PasskeyWalletMap` stores mappings derived from raw passkey bytes

IMPORTANT:
- These keys depend on the exact hashing/domain-separation logic below.
- Changing encoding, validation, or domain strings will break compatibility
with existing stored mappings.
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

udt_union_v0.doc:
Shared storage keys for token utilities and asset configuration.

NOTE:
- `AllowanceExpiration` is stored as a ledger offset, not an absolute ledger.
- Spend limits are stored in instance storage because they are contract-wide config.
- Supported assets are stored in persistent storage as a set-like `Map<Address, ()>`.
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

void_v0.doc: Relative ledger offset used when creating token approvals.
void_v0.name: AllowanceExpiration

void_v0.doc: Default spend limit used when an asset-specific limit is not set.
void_v0.name: DefaultSpendLimit

void_v0.doc: Set of assets supported by the caller contract.
void_v0.name: SupportedAssets

udt_union_v0.doc:
Represents the type of upgrade proposal.

VARIANTS:
- Upgrade \xe2\x86\x92 contract WASM upgrade
- WalletVersion \xe2\x86\x92 update approved wallet implementation hash

DESIGN NOTE:
- This enum is persisted in storage via `ProposalType`.
- Must remain backward-compatible across contract upgrades.

IMPORTANT:
- Adding new variants in future requires:
- updating parsing logic (`upgrade_type`)
- ensuring backward compatibility with stored values
udt_union_v0.name: UpgradeType

udt_union_v0.doc:
Storage keys used by the upgrade governance module.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
DESIGN OVERVIEW
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Only ONE proposal can exist at any time.
- Proposal state is stored in instance storage (global, contract-wide).
- Voting data (`VotedList`) is stored in persistent storage.

CORE INVARIANTS:
- `FutureWASM` and `ProposalType` MUST always be written together.
- `UpgradeVotingDeadline != 0` implies an active proposal exists.
- When a proposal is cleared, ALL related state must be removed.

IMPORTANT:
- This module does NOT enforce authorization.
- Callers must enforce admin/governance permissions.

STORAGE SPLIT:
- Instance storage \xe2\x86\x92 proposal metadata (cheap, global)
- Persistent storage \xe2\x86\x92 voter participation (per-address state)
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

void_v0.doc:
UNIX timestamp after which the pending proposal may be executed.

NOTE:
- `0` means NO active proposal.
void_v0.name: UpgradeVotingDeadline

void_v0.doc:
WASM hash currently under vote.

INVARIANT:
- Must always exist together with `ProposalType`.
void_v0.name: FutureWASM

void_v0.doc:
Approved voter set.

NOTE:
- Managed separately (add/remove voter functions).
void_v0.name: VotersList

void_v0.doc:
Addresses that have voted for the current active proposal.

DESIGN:
- Global because only one proposal exists at a time.
- Cleared entirely when proposal ends.
void_v0.name: VotedList

void_v0.doc:
Latest approved wallet version hash.

NOTE:
- Used when proposal type = WalletVersion.
- Survives across proposals.
void_v0.name: WalletVersion

void_v0.doc:
Type of the currently active proposal.

INVARIANT:
- Must always exist together with `FutureWASM`.
void_v0.name: ProposalType
